operational_knowledge_units.title: OPC communication module mediates data exchange between Ignition/OPC and SorterSweeper
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the OPC communication module as the intermediary between Ignition-connected tags and the SorterSweeper module. It connects to the OPC server, subscribes to tags, forwards tag updates for processing, and receives outbound messages from SorterSweeper to write back to the OPC server.
observed_evidence: Ignition's built-in tag provider is used to connect to the hospital and tippers, relaying the relevant tags.
The OPC communication module connects to the OPC server and subscribes to tags.
When a tag is updated, it sends the update to the SorterSweeper module for processing.
SorterSweeper also sends messages to the OPC communication module, which writes the data to the OPC server.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: OPC Comm Module detailed design: Ignition built-in tag provider connects to hospital and tippers and relays relevant tags. OPC communication module connects to OPC server, subscribes to tags, sends tag updates to SorterSweeper for processing, and writes SorterSweeper messages back to the OPC server.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Tag update flow from OPC subscription to SorterSweeper processing
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide defines runtime behavior for subscribed OPC tags: when a tag changes, the OPC communication module passes the update to SorterSweeper for processing. It also defines the reverse behavior where SorterSweeper sends messages to the OPC communication module for OPC server writes.
observed_evidence: The OPC communication module connects to the OPC server and subscribes to tags.
When a tag is updated, it sends the update to the SorterSweeper module for processing.
SorterSweeper also sends messages to the OPC communication module, which writes the data to the OPC server.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Runtime behavior of OPC communication module: subscribes to OPC tags, forwards updated tag values to SorterSweeper for processing, and accepts SorterSweeper messages to write data back to the OPC server.
